name: Grandma's Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the green beans until tender.
2. While the beans are cooking, melt the margarine in a skillet over low heat.
3. Add the flour and stir constantly until it has browned.
4. Gradually add the water from the cooked beans to form a pasty mixture with the melted butter.
5. Continue stirring until the mixture becomes smooth.
6. Drain any remaining water from the beans.
7. Mix the beans into the flour mixture.
8. Add vinegar to taste and heat through, serving when thoroughly warmed.
This recipe can be easily doubled to accommodate larger servings.
